programme.title: Brooklyn's Finest
programme.desc: In the course of one chaotic week, the lives of three conflicted New York City police officers are dramatically transformed by their involvement in a massive drug operation. Burned out veteran Eddie Dugan (Golden-Globe®-winner Richard Gere of PRIMAL FEAR) is just one week away from his pension and a fishing cabin in Connecticut. Narcotics officer Sal Procida (Oscar®-nominee Ethan Hawke of TRAINING DAY) has discovered there's no line he won't cross to provide a better life for his long-suffering wife and seven children. And Clarence "Tango" Butler (Oscar®-nominee Don Cheadle of OCEAN'S ELEVEN Franchise) has been undercover so long his loyalties have started to shift from his fellow police officers to his prison buddy Caz (Wesley Snipes of BLADE), one of Brooklyn's most infamous drug dealers. With personal and work pressures bearing down on them, each man faces daily tests of judgment and honor in one of the world's most difficult jobs in this searing new crime drama from acclaimed director Antoine Fuqua (TRAINING DAY).

programme.desc: In the small town of Oak Creek, Noah Harrington's construction plans uncover old ‘Letters to Santa'. He teams up with town historian Tessa Findlay to fulfill the Christmas wishes, leading to an unexpected romance.

programme.title: Ancient Recipes With Sohla
programme.desc: Ancient Recipes with Sohla Sohla El-Waylly fries up a batch of the original Dutch colonial donuts.

programme.title: A Welcome Home Christmas
programme.desc: Michael and Chloe realize the greatest gift this season has been each other.

programme.title: Ancient Recipes With Sohla
programme.desc: Ancient Recipes with Sohla Sohla El-Waylly uncovers the true story of the first Thanksgiving.

programme.title: New For 2025: Christmas At Plumhill Manor
programme.desc: Margot Stone, a rising architect, discovers a magical Christmas secret.

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: Holly returns home for Christmas, and enters a contest to own her favorite bakery.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's unlucky in finding romance herself.

programme.title: An Unexpected Love
programme.desc: Woman in failing marriage attracted to female co-worker.

programme.title: Liz and Dick
programme.desc: Lindsay Lohan stars as Elizabeth Taylor in Lifetime Movie on her love affair.

programme.title: Twist of Faith
programme.desc: Toni Braxton, Mykelti Williamson, David Julian Hirsh in interfaith love film.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
programme.desc: The Bride (Uma Thurman) picks up where she left off in volume one with her quest to finish the hit list she has composed of all of the people who have wronged her, including ex-boyfriend Bill (David Carradine), who tried to have her killed four years ago during her wedding to another man. Leaving several dead in her wake, she eventually tracks down Bill in Mexico. Using skills she has learned during her assassin career, she attempts to finish what she set out to do in the first place.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: Charismatic British aristocrat and part-time shady art dealer Charlie Mortdecai (Johnny Depp) suffers from a constant lack of funds to support his lush lifestyle, so when Alistair Maitland (Ewan McGregor), a college friend and officer in MI5, asks him to find a stolen Goya painting, he accepts. But Charlie's not the only one with designs on the painting an American heiress and a revolutionary want it too, for the artwork is rumored to contain the code to a bank account filled with Nazi gold.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Three years after a fateful trip to the French Riviera, Jen (Katherine Heigl) enjoys the good life in suburbia with her handsome husband, Spencer (Ashton Kutcher). That comes crashing down, however, when gunfire rings out the morning after his 30th birthday. It turns out that Spencer has not been honest with Jen about his job he's a deadly spy. Now she must learn to dodge bullets while keeping up an appearance of normalcy.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: After surviving an assault from a squad of hit men, retired CIA agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) reassembles his old team for an all-out war. Frank reunites with old Joe (Morgan Freeman), crazy Marvin (John Malkovich) and wily Victoria (Helen Mirren) to uncover a massive conspiracy that threatens their lives. Only their expert training will allow them to survive a near-impossible mission -- breaking into CIA headquarters.

programme.title: Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: The birth of Bella and Edward's child ignites forces that threaten to destroy them all as tensions build toward all-out war between the Cullens and the Volturi in the thrilling conclusion to the epic phenomenon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: The battle for Earth continues when college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers and must join in their continued battle against the Decepticons.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Slow-witted Forrest Gump (Tom Hanks) has never thought of himself as disadvantaged, and thanks to his supportive mother (Sally Field), he leads anything but a restricted life. Whether dominating on the gridiron as a college football star, fighting in Vietnam or captaining a shrimp boat, Forrest inspires people with his childlike optimism. But one person Forrest cares about most may be the most difficult to save -- his childhood love, the sweet but troubled Jenny (Robin Wright).

programme.title: Saturday Night Fever
programme.desc: Tony Manero (John Travolta) doesn't have much going for him during the weekdays. He still lives at home and works as a paint store clerk in his Brooklyn, N.Y., neighborhood. But he lives for the weekends, when he and his friends go to the local disco and dance the night away. When a big dance competition is announced, he wrangles the beautiful and talented Stephanie (Karen Lynn Gorney) to be his partner. As the two train for the big night, they start to fall for each other as well.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Sam Wheat (Patrick Swayze) is a banker, Molly Jensen (Demi Moore) is an artist, and the two are madly in love. However, when Sam is murdered by friend and corrupt business partner Carl Bruner (Tony Goldwyn) over a shady business deal, he is left to roam the earth as a powerless spirit. When he learns of Carl's betrayal, Sam must seek the help of psychic Oda Mae Brown (Whoopi Goldberg) to set things right and protect Molly from Carl and his goons.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown to D-Day
programme.desc: Gen. Dwight D. Eisenhower (Tom Selleck) faces monumental decisions in the 90 days leading to the Allied invasion of Normandy in 1944.

programme.title: All the Pretty Horses
programme.desc: The year is 1949. A young Texan named John Grady finds himself without a home after his mother sells the ranch where he has spent his entire life. Lured south of the border by the romance of cowboy life and the promise of a fresh start, Cole and his pal embark on an adventure that will test their resilience, define their maturity, and change their lives forever.

programme.title: Murphy's Romance
programme.desc: Emma (Sally Field), a divorced single mother seeking to start her life over, moves to a small town in Arizona. She builds a relationship with Murphy (James Garner), the older local pharmacist but, due to his age, it remains platonic. Their friendship becomes complicated when Emma's ex-husband, Bobby Jack (Brian Kerwin), shows up. He claims to have changed his ways, but when he turns out to be the same man Emma divorced, she discovers her true feelings for Murphy.

programme.title: Pal Joey
programme.desc: Joey Evans (Frank Sinatra) is a philandering San Francisco-based singer with big dreams of starting his own night club, Chez Joey, but chasing women keeps him even more occupied. Despite making a meaningful connection with lovely chorus girl Linda English (Kim Novak), it doesn't stop him from seducing the wealthy widow, and ex-burlesque dancer, Vera Simpson (Rita Hayworth), who he hopes will bankroll his club. Ultimately, Joey has to decide who -- and what -- he most wants in life.

programme.title: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Edwin O'Connor, this political drama focuses on Frank Skeffington (Spencer Tracy), an aging mayor who is embarking on his final campaign for reelection. Aided by his nephew, Adam Caulfield (Jeffrey Hunter), and savvy strategist John Gorman (Pat O'Brien), Skeffington faces considerable challenges as the political landscape that he knows slowly crumbles away, but, undaunted, he remains determined to stay in the game a bit longer.

programme.title: The Wackiest Ship in the Army
programme.desc: Lt. Rip Crandall (Jack Lemmon) is entrusted with one of the most important missions of his World War II career: to shuttle an Australian spy (Chips Rafferty) into enemy territory. Unfortunately, he'll be doing it with one of the Navy's least seaworthy vessels, the USS Echo. But even in a clunker of a ship, Crandall and his madcap crew -- including his enthusiastic young ensign (Ricky Nelson) -- do their best to make their ill-equipped mission a success.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Beowulf
programme.desc: After Beowulf, the mightiest warrior of all, destroyes the overpowering demon Grendel, he incurs wrath of the beast's mother to seek out revenge.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Two thrill-seeking adventurers cross paths with a beautiful doctor and they find themselves on the ultimate hunt for a treasure that claims all who seek it.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: After 15 years of marriage, Katie (Michelle Pfeiffer) and her husband, Ben (Bruce Willis), have grown apart. While they keep up the facade of having a contented marriage, mostly to not worry their children, they aren't happy together and argue frequently. While the kids are away at camp, Katie and Ben decide to separate and try to reassess their relationship to see if they should stay together or split up for good. Can they find enough that's positive in their marriage to keep it going?

programme.title: Must Be Santa
programme.desc: An angel (Deanna Milligan) must convince a new recruit (Arnold Pinnock) that he should be Santa, to the dismay of her boss, the North Pole's CEO (Dabney Coleman).

programme.title: The Munsters' Scary Little Christmas
programme.desc: Herman (Sam McMurray), Lily (Ann Magnuson) and the others try to re-create a Transylvanian holiday for homesick Eddie (Bug Hall).

programme.title: Christmas at the Riviera
programme.desc: An assistant manager tries to run a hotel at Christmastime.

programme.title: Wedding Palace
programme.desc: Jason finds the woman of his dreams online and tries to make it work in person.

programme.title: The Meddler
programme.desc: German Cabrera is a man obsessed with recording the violent crime that permeates the streets of Guatemala City. His obsession places him in the line of fire in one of the most dangerous cities in the world.

programme.title: Brooklyn Rules
programme.desc: A college student (Freddie Prinze Jr.) feels torn by loyalty to his friends and a desire to earn a law degree and escape from his old neighborhood.

programme.title: aTypical Wednesday
programme.desc: A well-intentioned man's weekly therapy visit takes a turn when a kid is "left behind" at the therapist's office and has to find his way home.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Tiny's bar will close unless he pays $17K customers rally to save it. Meanwhile, Jay's hazing alarms.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: You, Me, and that Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Partnered with nature-hating Nathan, Rebecca is put to the test during a work mountain retreat.

programme.title: A Slice of Romance
programme.desc: PR exec Mikayla strikes a deal with pastry chef Austin to rebrand his café to get dating advice.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: A matchmaker risks falling for a real-life prince before his royal wedding date.

programme.title: Crazy Romance (Dubbed)
programme.desc: In an office where gossip spreads like a wildfire two co-workers with opposite personalities bond over the stories of their recent breakups.

programme.title: 26 Years (Dubbed)
programme.desc: Four men scarred by the 1980 Gwangju Massacre plan to assassinate the unrepentant ex-president responsible.

programme.title: Miss Conspirator (Dubbed)
programme.desc: When a women with a panic disorder gets entangled in a 44 million dollars drug deal gone wrong she is forced to cope with her phobia as police and mafia track her down.

programme.title: Evil Empire: Friday the 13th Chapter 2
programme.desc: A series of serial killings known as the "Suicide Syndrome" continue to occur simultaneously, and the whereabouts of both Phillip and Cheong-ha, who were investigating the case, remain mysterious. Meanwhile, the young police officer Jae-hyeok, who provided crucial clues to Cheong-ha in her time of crisis, finds himself relentlessly pursued by killers dispatched from Japan and the United States. Despite relying on information from an anonymous woman who calls him unilaterally, Jae-hyeok unwittingly gets drawn closer to the center of the case as the situation progresses. What is the key to the case that Jae-hyeok holds? Why are ruthless killers from the United States pursuing him? Why is the foreign police from Japan investigating the "Suicide Syndrome" in Korea? And why is North Korea trying to conceal the truth about a secret project from the Japanese military? GenreAt the same time, in a hospital in Pyongyang, North Korea, a female doctor discovers a phenomenon where the cells of the deceased are being revived. However, she is forced to flee to South Korea due to the authorities' pursuit.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: Even though Dong-seok won last year's national tournament, people credit his father for the achievement. Dong-seok quits the gym and makes a living out of part-time jobs. One day, he hears about his father's death and the truth he was not aware of. He returns to the gym to bring back his glory.

programme.title: YMCA Baseball Team
programme.desc: Korea's first baseball team wins games and the hearts and hopes of her people.

programme.title: When Romance Meets Destiny
programme.desc: Two brothers, Kwang-Sik and Kwang-Tae, have very different attitudes toward women. Kwang-Sik is extremely shy and can't say a word to a woman. But Kwang-Tae is a playboy who just sleeps around. One day, Kwang-Sik meets Yoon-Kyung for the first time in seven years and he tries to confess his feelings to her, in his own way. Similarly, Kwang-Tae meets Kyung-Jae during a marathon and he tries his own ways on her.At first Kwang-Sik still finds it very difficult to even talk to Yoon-Kyung and Kwang-Tae thinks of Kyung-Jae as yet another temporary conquest, but in each case something changes in the brothers. Will they be able to love this time?

programme.title: How to steal a dog
programme.desc: Ji-so, a young girl who doesn't have a house because of her bankrupted dad. In order to get money to buy a house she plan to steals wealthy people's dogs to earn reward money when she returns them.

programme.title: Despise Not, My Youth
programme.desc: The most popular guy in school, Jason, is bullying his classmates, and living a life of mischief, until one day after getting high, he hears the voice of God commanding him to change his ways, or face going to hell.

programme.title: Monogamish
programme.desc: Successful realtor Zane is living the American dream: a perfect NFL Husband, a nice house and a growing business until the day her husband presents her with a request. He wants to be polyamorous. Fighting to save her failing marriage, she learns he is in debt to a drug lord and her business is failing. Unknown to her, plans are in motion that will change her life forever.

programme.title: Ebony Hustle
programme.desc: BAM baby! You busted! Ex-stripper turned private investigator, Ebony, takes on her most dangerous case yet.

programme.desc: Well-established blues singer, Miracle, has everything anyone could ask for, but fails to appreciate it. When an accident forces her to confront her past, she must face the music. It will take A Christmas Miracle for her to count her blessings.

programme.desc: Paroled after 5 years for a victimless crime, Travis is taken in by an acquaintance, Benny, and her mother. Their generosity turns into a life of crime and murder. As he falls for a woman named Bear, Travis must escape the web of secrets and lies he's trapped in, fighting for survival and the love he's found.

programme.title: Thunderhoof

Soon, their stagecoach is hijacked by a trio of merciless bandits, led by the especially heartless Frank Usher (Richard Boone). As Usher holds the coach passengers hostage, Brennan falls in love with Doretta and develops a risky plan to free himself and the Mimses, leading to a bloody final standoff.

programme.title: Reprisal!

When Frank moves in, he finds that the bigoted townspeople have recently let three brothers, who are also his neighbors, get away with the lynching murder of innocent Native Americans. As tensions between the townspeople and local Native Americans rise, Hank becomes torn between fighting against injustice and keeping his true identity a secret.

programme.desc: A boy and his mother are kidnapped by outlaws after the boy's stallion kills the outlaw leader's mount.

programme.desc: Gene Autry and pal Mike hunt bank robbers Al Bartlett and Trot Lucas. To throw off his pursuers, Bartlett kills his own twin brother and Lucas hoping that Gene and the Sheriff will believe him dead.

programme.desc: When natural cement is discovered by two prospectors, one is murdered during a claim jump attempt. Marshal Gene Autry befriends the lone prospector and tries to help him promote his cement discovery.

programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.desc: Tasked with guarding a bank's gold supply, a man (Craig Hill) comes up against a vicious gang determined to steal it.

programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.desc: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured Western hero to lure tourists into his dying town.

programme.desc: A sheriff pursues deadly gunslinger Sam Bolt and finds an unlikely ally in one of Bolt's partners.

programme.desc: A young cowpoke gets into a fight with a local over a girl and faces a harsh prison term.

programme.desc: Tom does the mining and Rupert the cooking in a partnership, where any profits are split equally one day, Rupert becomes suspicious of Tom's behavior, especially concerning neighbor Mrs. Daigle and interest in her farm.

programme.desc: Billy the Kid (Robert Blake) avenges a friend.

programme.desc: A prospector bets on a speedy Native American to win in a footrace and bribes his opponent to lose.

programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevenson is exploring a deserted mine with his son when they discover a Wells Fargo strongbox.

programme.desc: A hired hand (Claude Akins) victimizes the Cartwrights' disabled neighbor (Harry Townes).

When his ex-fiancée, Charli (Zoe Saldana), pulls in to the gas station where he works, Cool realizes that he still loves her after three years apart. programme.title: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

programme.title: Coffy

Disguised as a prostitute, Coffy goes on a killing rampage, at first going after street dealers and pimps such as sleazy King George (Robert DoQui), then gradually working her way up to bigger honchos. She's shocked, however, when she discovers that her politician boyfriend (Booker Bradshaw) is involved.

programme.title: Foxy Brown

When gangsters later kill the cop, Foxy is quick to make the connection and swears vengeance. Posing as a prostitute, and with the help of a group of neighborhood vigilantes, she gradually tracks down the hit men, their Mafia bosses and her own brother.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is in the magic town of Maní to learn about something sacred to the Mayans - bees and honey. A cooperative of women who protect the endangered Melipona, a stingless bee native to Yucatán, invites her to join in a Mayan energy cleansing ritual involving buñuelos made with Melipona honey. Then she visits a family living by the traditional "Solar Maya," meaning they grow everything they eat.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tekit, or "The Capital of the Guayabera," Pati encounters a tale of sons going against their father's wishes to follow their own path. Pati meets Eliodoro Xicum, a farmer's son who went against his father to build a family business making the iconic Guayabera shirts. Then she meets his son, Elio, who chose to become a chef and created a dish that resembles a Guayabera in honor of his father.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the vibrant streets of Yucatán's capital, Mérida, in search of its flavors. She tries "the best tacos in Mérida" at Wayan'e. The aroma of freshly made cookies lures her to Dondé Fabric, where their globitos and bizcochitos are an important part of Mérida's mornings. She has sorbet at a shop run by the same family for generations and tastes a unique Yucatecan liqueur.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons: Jamie Makes the World's Best Christmas Lasagne

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: The Swing Clinic: Feather Sound 2 of 2
programme.desc: In this episode of Swing Clinic, Jimmy Hanlin and Claire Hogle share short game tips while playing Feather Sound near St. Pete–Clearwater. They demonstrate how to add spin to chip shots, escape trouble from the woods, and use a clever “dollar bill” drill for bunker play. Around the green, they highlight how club selection and syncing arms with body improve control. With clear, practical advice and a fun, relaxed style, the episode delivers both instruction and entertainment. The day wraps up on a St. Pete rooftop bar, where Jimmy and Claire unwind and reflect on the game.

programme.title: For The Dream

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: Fur Hat Ice Tour
programme.desc: In the first episode, Steven Rinella takes Tracy Crane, an inexperienced and slightly skeptical first timer, ice fishing at a series of local neighborhood ponds. Their goal is modest and attainable: catch enough panfish for a meal. Steve teaches Tracy the basic why and how of ice fishing for perch and bluegill, they catch a few fish, and share the spoils after.

programme.title: Fur Hat Ice Tour
programme.desc: To pivot off of the ease and accessibility we featured in episode 1, episode 2 goes the opposite direction and shows Cal and Miles embarking on a deep backcountry winter expedition requiring tracked Can-Ams and thousands of pounds of gear. Ice fishing can be simple and local, but it can also be adventurous. Cal and Miles explore a high mountain Montana lake that Cal‚Äôs been wanting to fish for two decades, in the hopes of catching a large, or at least respectable, burbot.

programme.title: Fur Hat Ice Tour
programme.desc: Janis Putelis starts the Tour at Whitefish Lake, Minnesota, where he meets wild foods expert Mark Norquist from Modern Carnivore. Mark introduces Janis to dark house ice spearing, a traditional winter food gathering method in the Midwest. Together, they cut a hole in the ice, set up a dark shelter, and use long-handled tridents to spear lake whitefish and northern pike. Chef Lukas Leaf joins them on the ice to cook fresh whitefish cakes.

programme.title: Fur Hat Ice Tour
programme.sub-title: Walleye Fishing in Lake Mille Lacs ft. Mandy Uhrich
programme.desc: Janis Putelis teams up with renowned angler and biologist Mandy Uhrich on Lake Mille Lacs. They confront the stark reality: Mille Lacs is not the walleye haven it once was. Through discussions with local anglers, fish biologists, and business owners, including the former head of the Minnesota DNR, Janis strives to fathom the intricacies of this transformation

programme.title: Fur Hat Ice Tour
programme.desc: Janis hops the state line over to Wisconsin and travels to Lake Winnebago for the annual lake sturgeon spearing season. Lake sturgeon are ancient and incredible fish, and the communities around lake Winnebago have long revered and relied on these fish. Local angler Jake Andrews is one of the few who consistently gets sturgeon almost every season. In this episode Janis hooks up with Jake and his crew to prep for the season opener.

programme.title: Fur Hat Ice Tour
programme.desc: While part 1 is all about the preparation for sturgeon season, part 2 follows Janis, Jake, and his whole crew as they attempt to achieve the improbable, spear a lake sturgeon by hand through a hole in the ice. Success requires patience, intense focus, quick reflexes, and a steady hand. Will Janis and Jake be one of the triumphant few, or will they go home empty handed?

programme.title: Fur Hat Ice Tour
programme.sub-title: Ice Fishing in Downtown Green Bay & Homemade Airboat Ride
programme.desc: Pat Durkin guides Janis through the conservation success of Green Bay, Wisconsin, highlighting the Fox River and Lake Michigan's positive transformation. They engage in urban ice fishing and an adventurous homemade airboat ride. Heading north to Sturgeon Bay, they rendezvous with expert guide JJ Malvitz. The episode culminates in JJ's shop, where a grand fish fry and a masterclass in crafting the perfect Old Fashioned.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve Rinella and Chef Kevin Gillespie are back in the kitchen, this time to work some magic with meat from his New Mexico bull elk. Kevin shows shows Steve one of his favorite quick dinner fixes, Vietnamese Style Shakin Elk. The two discuss some of the mythology surrounding marinades and brining, plus Steve shows off his prized culinary possesion, his citrus juicer.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Snow Goose gets a bad rap for being less than extraordinary when it comes to table fare. In reality nothing could be further from the truth! Kevin Gillespie shows Sean Weaver a spin on an American classic, Steak Diane, that is sure to impress even the most skeptical waterfowler.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Wild + Whole is rooted in the values of sustainable eating, which often means making use of less common ingredients alongside foods in the peak of the season. Kevin and Danielle work together to transform two strikingly different ingredients, Fresh Duck Liver and Chanterelle Mushrooms, into a dish that would be right at home on the menu of any of Kevin's restaurants.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In a new take on the classic “meat and bread” combo, Top Chef finalist and Fan Favorite Kevin Gillespie shows Steve how to whip up a crispy Torta Milanese with the mountain goat Steve shot while filming MeatEater's 10th Season. The duo harvest some fresh veggies from Steve's garden while discussing the challenges that face anyone who hunts the high mountains. Kevin shares the story of his last Mountain Goat hunt while showing Steve a few chef tricks.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Kimi Werner certainly knows her way around a kitchen, and when it comes to anything seafood she is an absolute pro. But even pros can still learn something new on occasion and Kevin wants to share a method of preparing octopus with Kimi that he learned from a fellow chef, who is famous for his octopus preparations. The two work together to create a real showstopper of a dish, while sharing tips and tricks along the way that will make them both better cooks when they return home.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Seth Morris and Chester Floyd are no strangers to a good fish fry. In this episode, they're working with Chef Kevin Gillespie to find a slightly more elevated approach to this classic preparation. The end result is sure to leave you with a strong desire to head out and catch a limit of walleye.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: On this episode of MeatEater Cooks, Mark Kenyon and Kevin Gillespie team up to prepare Moussaka with some hard earned ground venison. There is nothing fast about this technical layered dish, but the end result is worth the time in the kitchen. Level up your ground venison game with this restaurant-ready masterpiece.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Join Janis Putelis and Kevin Gillespie as they prepare mountain lion sandwiches right from Janis's kitchen. With a recipe that includes sausage, bacon, cheese, homemade coleslaw, and a fresh mountain lion loin, is it possible this is the best sandwich ever made? Tune in to find out.

programme.title: Fishing The Wild with Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Madagasgar- the crew explores inland on their remote island. Mike cooks Spanish makerel and the crew fishes with tuna to catch sailfish to feed the islanders. Mike and Joe Traeger roast sailfish curry back in England.

programme.title: Wild Fish Wild Places
programme.desc: Denis and Jarod do something a little different. They travel across the country to be in a Salmon Tournament.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Walleye Shore Lunch & Grilled Elk Chops
programme.desc: Chef Zimmern grills elk chops with mustard glaze over charcoal, served with rutabaga and bacon, apples,onions.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Pig roast: Andrew Zimmern marinates a hog in orange juice, vinegar and garlic, then roasts it in a caja china.

programme.title: The Woodsman
programme.desc: Coming off his best season ever, Mark Driver looks to continue that success in the 2023 deer season. Then the Barber brothers head to Illinois hoping to knock down a big buck with the CVA muzzleloader.

programme.title: HUNTER
programme.desc: Dave is in bear camp Saskatchewan, CAN with a group from all over the USA, and checks off a list of firsts - including his first ever color phased bear.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.sub-title: Fighting Giant Grouper in Key West
programme.desc: The Spear Life crew's starting the year off by heading to Key West, and the plan is to meet up with Captain Robert Trossett again. The crew's in good hands, as Robert puts them on the fish, and by the end of the trip the guys double-team a GIANT grouper, and then round out the trip with an unforgettable hook 'n cook.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.sub-title: Chasing Giant Hogfish at the Florida Middlegrounds
programme.desc: The Spear Life Crew is returning to the Florida Middlegrounds this week, and the name of the game is hogfish. Last year Coby missed a hog of a lifetime here, which Jon ended up shooting. But this year, the guys are back and hoping they can top last year's haul.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.sub-title: Diving Historical Wrecks off the Coast of Mississippi
programme.desc: The Spear Life Crew heads to Mississippi this week with plans to dive a couple shipwrecks, such as the ""New Venture"" and the ""Anderson Liberty."" And after the guys finish brushing up on their history checking out the wrecks, they shift gears and hit the spearfishing hard, all in hopes of filling the cooler for their hook 'n cook.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.sub-title: Kickin' it in Key West with Country Music Stars
programme.desc: The Key West Songwriters Festival is a huge country music festival that takes place each year for five days and nights of live music. And it just so happens that the Spear Life crew is down in Key West at the same time, so tune in as the guys kick it with Bobby Pinson and friends, as well as getting into some great spearfishing action.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.sub-title: Dangerous Cage Match with Big Red Snappers
programme.desc: It's red snapper season in Alabama, and the Spear Life crew's looking to limit out this trip. Everything starts out great as the guys get into the snapper action, however things quickly take a turn for the worse as both Gary and Jon find out just how dangerous it can be when you're miles offshore.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.sub-title: The Quest for Giant Megalodon Teeth
programme.desc: The Spear Life Crew returns to North Carolina, and while the guys are looking forward to the spearfishing as always, they're hoping to also find some giant Megalodon teeth on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Spear Life
programme.sub-title: The Only Father and Son Duo in the Spearfishing Hall of Fame
programme.desc: The Spear Life Crew is taking a trip down memory lane this week as the guys head to Gary's family ranch. Jon's been coming here with Gary to hunt for years now, but it's been about 15 years since the last time he was here. And joined by the diving legend himself, Gary's father Jim Zumwalt, this trip's got it all: great spearfishing action, insane shark feeding frenzies, as well as good memories.

programme.title: The Other Side of Fear
programme.desc: Big wave surfer Mark Mathews has made a career out of seemingly defying fear at every opportunity.

programme.title: Natural Selection: Selective Memory
programme.desc: YETI Natural Selection “Revelstoke Super Session” captures the most prominent riders at Boulder Park.

programme.title: Natural Selection: Selective Memory
programme.desc: The Natural Selection Tour reveals a competition series in the “Selective Memory” presented by YETI.

programme.title: Originate
programme.desc: Michelle Parker, Angel Collinson and Elyse Saugstad head north to Alaska to complete their all-female segment.

programme.title: Originate
programme.desc: We learn how Michelle Parker has progressed in a sport where she's primarily the only woman.

programme.title: Maryland Cycling Classic Men's 2025
programme.desc: Maryland Cycling Classic debuts both men's and women's competitions together for the first time.

programme.title: Art of Flight: The Series
programme.desc: With excellent conditions at home in Jackson Hole, Wyoming the riders build massive jumps and take huge risks.

programme.title: Art of Flight: The Series
programme.desc: This is the last The Art of Flight shoot and with nothing to lose and everything to gain.

programme.title: USSS 2025-26: Stifel Copper Cup, Women's Giant Slalom Run 2, Copper Mountain, CO (Nov 2025)
programme.desc: The 2025-2026 Copper Mountain Stifel Copper Cup Women's Giant Slalom Run 2.

programme.title: Mighty Bite
programme.desc: The Mighty Bite is the worlds ONLY proven and patented 5-SENSE fishing lure.

programme.title: HuntStand TIps and Gear
programme.desc: Join Cody Butler for a deep dive into ground blind strategies for bowhunting turkeys. Discover essential tips and tactics for bagging big toms with your bow from ground blinds. Learn about optimal blind placement for a successful turkey hunt.

programme.title: HuntStand TIps and Gear
programme.sub-title: HuntStand Tips & Gear - "Introducing the Savage Ultralite Elite Rifle
programme.desc: The Savage 110 Ultralite Elite is a lightweight, compact rifle that's ideal for backcountry hunters. This rifle cuts weight with features such as a Proof Research carbon-fiber wrapped stainless-steel barrel and MDT HNT26 folding carbon-fiber stock.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.sub-title: Hard Truths of Conservation - "Tajikistan, a Mountainous Land
programme.desc: With the fall of the Soviet Union, wildlife populations in Tajikistan were devastated, bringing some of their unique mountain species to the brink of extinction. With the help of funds generated through hunting, vast areas are now being conserved and protected. Dan Cabela explores this conservation success.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Trenton is headed to meet up with Andrew Norbye on Lake Guntersville in Alabama. With not a lot of current being pulled, the deep schools weren't set up to feed. So they went up shallow to fish grass until evening time when the ledge fish really started biting.

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode Captain Brandon Branch decided to go back to his roots and fish with a long time friend Laremy Strickland. They've been fishing together for over 10 years now and on this episode they'll be competing to see who can catch the biggest bag.

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP meets up with bass tournament anglers Lenny DeVos and Dr. Bruce Tufts north of Kingston Ontario

programme.title: FinQuest
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of FinQuest, Ryan Miller dives into the vibrant world of offshore fishing off the coast of Palm Beach County. Joined by Cabo Mike, they showcase expert bait techniques and strategies, reeling in a variety of catches, including bonita and a stunning mahi mahi. The duo shares insights into their fishing setup, explains the use of daisy chains, and celebrates their exciting day at sea. With breathtaking views of the ocean and a colorful array of fish, Ryan's passion for saltwater fishing shines through. The episode wraps up with a reflection on the beauty and bounty of Palm Beach County waters.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoor
programme.desc: The season finale, where we take a look at all the highlights of the season and some of our favorite moments.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: On this episode, we flashback to one of our favorite episodes of Season 2! Capt. Danny joins his good buddy and talented marine artist, Stephen Ferrell. The two of them aim to fish some of Stephen's favorite paddle-board spots here in Melbourne, Florida. Tune in and see what they can make happen on a windy day seeking the elusive Snook!

programme.title: Captain's Log

programme.title: Louisiana Catch and Cook
programme.desc: In this episode we're headed down to the fishing village of Shell Beach in St. Bernard Parish for a full Louisiana experience! Joining us is Chef Lynnae Oxley, a chef from the Pacific Northwest who once beat our own Jay Ducote on Food Network's Chopped. On the way, we make a pit stop at the iconic Abita Brewery on Tchoupitoulas in New Orleans, then grab lunch and cook up some classic hog's head cheese at Jeanfreau's Meat Market. From there, it's all about the water — trout and redfish with Captain Don, crawfish and crabs with Captain Sal, followed by the ultimate Louisiana feast as we cook up our fresh catch at the Gotcha Hooked Lodge's outdoor kitchen. It's fishing, food, and culture — served up Bayou style! Ready to go catchin' with one of Louisiana's best captains? Visit www.LouisianaCharterFishing.com to check availability or book your trip today!

While the drug-ingesting duo is soon arrested for possession of marijuana, Anthony and Pedro get released on a technicality, allowing them to continue their many misadventures and ultimately compete in a rock band contest, where they perform the raucous tune "Earache My Eye."

programme.title: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: After his beloved father (Brian Dennehy) dies, dimwitted Tommy Callahan (Chris Farley) inherits a near-bankrupt automobile parts factory in Sandusky, Ohio. His brand new stepmother, Beverly (Bo Derek), wants to cash out and close, but Tommy's sentimental attachment to his father's employees spurs him to make one last-ditch effort to find someone who will buy their products. With his father's tightly wound assistant, Richard (David Spade), in tow, Tommy hits the road to scare up some new clients.

programme.title: 48 HRS.
programme.desc: Renegade cop Jack Cates (Nick Nolte) pulls bank robber Reggie Hammond (Eddie Murphy) from a federal prison on a 48-hour leave to help him capture Hammond's old partner, Albert Ganz (James Remar). Having escaped from a prison work crew, Ganz is on a killing spree around San Francisco, on the trail of half a million dollars that went missing after one of his robberies. The cocky Reggie knows where the money is, but spars with the hotheaded Jack as he enjoys his temporary freedom.

programme.title: Sam Adams
programme.desc: Smooth. Clever. Hilarious. These words are often used to describe Sam Adams as a comedian, public speaker and Master of Ceremonies. In 2001, he stepped on stage to perform stand-up comedy for the first time, at age 41. Eight years later Sam turned to a career in comedy full-time after winning at the Great American Comedy Festival. Sam changed careers after making a name for himself as one of Denver's premier sports journalists. In 2003 was voted by his peers as Colorado's “Print Journalist of the Year.” As a reporter and columnist his work has been featured in The Denver Post, The Charlotte Observer, Rocky Mountain News and Colorado Avid Golfer magazine. Sam has also made numerous TV appearances on ESPN, Fox Sports, CBS, NBC and NFL Network. In 2013, he wrote a book, 'If You Don't Believe Me: Lessons Learned From Listening To The Greats,” giving readers an inside look at his 23-year career as a sports journalist.

programme.title: Tim Wilkins
programme.desc: Today that dream is more alive than ever as he is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world. He has entertained millions in legendary venues ranging from Radio City Music Hall to chow halls in Afghanistan, to colleges, casinos and cruise ships.

programme.title: Taylor Mason
programme.desc: Taylor Mason is your average, run-of-the-mill writer, performer, singer-songwriter, ventriloquist, comedian, entertainer, rock'n'roller, puppeteer, pianist, entertainer, and is here now for Dry Bar Comedy.

programme.title: Susan Jones: Lady Ha Ha
programme.desc: Susan Jones is a tenacious headlining comedian, writer, master of ceremonies, and motivational force with national touring experience.

programme.title: Warren B Hall
programme.desc: Simply put Warren B Hall is not what you're expecting. He purposely avoids using the white vs black angle done by many mainstream black comedians. Daring to be different, Warren chooses to focus on funny! Earlier this year Warren was seen on the FOX TV show “Laughs”, he's also a regular on the Bob and Tom Morning Show. More importantly, Warren has gone overseas and performed for our troops stationed in Iraq, Kuwait and Afghanistan...not once or twice, but FIVE times. His style is original, relatable and definitely funny. Don't take his word for it, see some of the funny for yourself.

programme.title: Tyler Boeh
programme.desc: Who goes from being a mild-mannered nationally recognized college a Capella group vocal percussionist to becoming a high-energy, intelligent, physical, and downright silly beatboxing comedian? None other than Comedian Tyler Boeh, who shifted his focus from singing a Capella (a word he describes as Latin for “Without Girlfriend”) when he won a comedy contest in Portland Oregon. After winning and placing in the finals of numerous Comedy Competitions from San Francisco to Seattle to Boston to The World Series of Comedy, Boeh not only launched a great career in comedy including television appearances, colleges, cruise ships and headlining clubs, he also found a girlfriend. Tyler's comedy CD was chosen by LaughSpin Magazine as the Best Comedy Album of 2012 and you may have seen him on such shows as Celebrity Name Game, Moms Rule, Nesn Comedy All Stars, or heard him on SIRIUS radio. Don't miss a chance to see Tyler live.

programme.title: Tyler Boeh
programme.desc: In this laugh-out-loud Dry Bar Comedy special, Tyler Boeh talks about how to get respect at Home Depot, the problems with post offices nowadays, and giving his kids all crusts and apple skins in their packed lunches.

programme.title: Shayne Smith
programme.desc: In his second Dry Bar Comedy special, stand-up comedian Shayne Smith delivers more stories about everything from a failed robbery to a wrestling match in the New York Subway, claw machines, Florida headline shenanigans, and even saving the life of a dog.

programme.title: Brad Upton
programme.desc: Brad Upton unleashes his comedic prowess by roasting millennials. With no intention of slowing down, he sets his sights on satirizing lampoon masks, merging, and millionaires. Brad takes the audience on another uproarious comedy ride as he fearlessly tackles these timely subjects, leaving no stone unturned in his quest for laughter.

Long ago, his beloved Jessie (Kristy Swanson) was snatched away from him by an evil wizard (Terry Kiser) who used his powers to transform her into wooden statue. Now Jessie is in Jason's department store as a mannequin. When he encounters her, she awakens from her thousand-year sleep. They quickly revive their romance, but the evil wizard has been reincarnated as well, and he's up to no good.

programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: Each episode gives viewers an inside look at television, film and music, including interviews with each industry's biggest stars. Over the years, many celebrities have "broken their silence" regarding various scandals or tragedies with hosts and correspondents from "ET." In addition to covering breaking news, the show visits sets of movies and TV shows and heads to the red carpet to cover awards shows and other major events. Airing daily since 1981, "Entertainment Tonight" is the template by which many other entertainment newsmagazines are based.

programme.title: Burned by a Giant Fireworm!

programme.title: Electric Eel Shocks Me Again... and Again!

programme.title: Attacked by Bloodsucking Parasites!

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: The journey leads through one of the most fascinating delta landscapes in the world. Starting in the untouched jungle of the Tumucumaque in the north of the Amazon delta, the journey continues south by boat across the 30 kilometre wide river to the Ilha de Maraj. The largest river island in the world, as large as Switzerland, is surrounded by wide beaches, mangrove forests and floodplain forests. On the island untouched jungle and wet savannah characterise the land. Fishermen and aai farmers live from the fruits of nature on the edge of the numerous river veins and flood plains and the collection of medicinal plants serves here, far away from civilization, as a living for the people. On the south side of the delta in the city of Belem we explore the exotic world of the famous Ver-o-Peso market with its impressive variety of fish, tropical fruits, spices and medicinal herbs.

programme.title: Planet 4K
programme.sub-title: South America - From Ecuador to Bolivia
programme.desc: The film takes you on a journey that begins deep in the rainforest and ends in Patagonia with its glaciers and snow-capped volcanoes. During the earth's formation, the South American continent evolved as the most autonomous of the continents. The area developed its own unique flora and fauna, jungles with unbelievable biodiversity, climbers and vines. Even today, the number of tropical plants in the region remains a mystery. A trip to South America is a glimpse into the past. The film takes you on a journey that begins deep in the rainforest and ends in Patagonia with its glaciers and snow-capped volcanoes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricanes '07
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile– the area the South Americans call the “Fin del Mundo” – the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat “Northanger” to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.8
programme.desc: The wild lures us in with its beauty and awe... and then pounces.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 2.13
programme.desc: Come join the hunt within the marshy swamps alongside these legendary cold-blooded reptiles.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core
programme.desc: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Shear Strength
programme.desc: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature's deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes' shear strength.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the world's worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet – 231 miles per hour – was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a “human popsicle”, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Council's high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water Two
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is “Wild Water” – our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: George Kourounis returns to “Tornado Alley” with three of his fellow stormchasers to see what the 2007 Storm Season will bring. He gets a birthday gift of a large Kansas tornado, then travels to Missouri to witness a string of violent thunderstorms. Heading west to Crazy Horse Mountain, the team is in place for a huge storm sweeping through the Badlands of South Dakota.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Avalanche
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hottest & Coldest
programme.desc: George experiences the most extreme climates in North America. First he visits the hottest place on the continent – Death Valley, then the coldest – Snag, Yukon.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricanes '07
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn About Animals Around the World
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. Join us to dance along to classical melodies as we learn animal names through narration and repetition or simply enjoy seeing live-action footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a slide game before watching Becky and Jed look for eggs on their farm. Then their mum cooks them for their tea. In Teletubbyland, the Lion and Bear play their hide and seek game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are feeling hungry, so they sit down to eat some Tubby Toast, but the Tubby Toaster isn't working. They watch a little girl called Becky make chocolate flake cakes for her friend Mark.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run to see Debbie and the children singing songs. A voice trumpet appears and plays a game with Po and Tinky Winky. It's called "Two Little Teletubbies Sitting On A Hill".

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children play with balls of different shapes and sizes. In Teletubbyland, something happens to Dipsy's hat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are eating Tubby Toast. They play the game 'Two Little Teletubbies', but while they are playing the Noo-Noo tidies up their Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are eating Tubby Toast. They stop to watch Amy making pasta. A ball of string appears in Teletubbyland. Po knocks the string in to the air with her scooter and it makes a stringy mess all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky calls the other Tubbies to come and watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story about the naughty sock. The Tubby Toast machine makes a tower of tubby toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies play walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies

Soon Orange's store is overflowing with Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. It's the berry first time Orange has not been able to find a “place for everything” in her store.

Recorded in Nashville, TN, the performance features 14 songs, including favorites like "Do the Blippi Dance," "Brush Brush Your Teeth," and "Monster Truck." Your Blippi fan will enjoy learning about the world while singing and dancing along with this special show. There's so much to explore—it'll make you want to sing and shout!

programme.title: Room at the Top
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! programme.title: Blippi's Alphabet and Transportation Adventures

From solving puzzles and meeting farm animals to discovering vintage buses and historic airplanes, Blippi makes learning an adventure filled with curiosity and fun.

programme.title: Blippi's Fun and Colorful Exploration

Each adventure is packed with laughter, creativity, and educational moments, making learning a joyful experience for kids.

programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Pond Pirates // The Coolest Girl I Know
programme.desc: When Rev's dad tells about him about treasure sunken in the pond, Rev and Avery set out on a pirate adventure! They outfit Rumble and Alley with new dive equipment to salvage the long-lost toys and cherished memories found within the chest. // When Rev's cousin Katie comes to visit, Avery's jealousy gets the best of her-Avery always thought she was the coolest girl Rev knew! Intent on outdoing Katie, Avery pulls a stunt that she comes to regret.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and the gang are painting a mural for Four-Wheeled Friendship Day! But with Avery in charge, the friends start to lose confidence in their work. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day // The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bo to the Rescue // Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: When Bo messes up on a few rescue missions, he decides to quit Bo's Rescue Hotline. Wanting to help their friend, the gang creates fake emergencies for Bo to solve. But as the friends find out, it takes more than trickery to build self-confidence! // As a heatwave hits Fender Bend, Rev and his friends look forward to Ice Cream Dream Day! But when the ice cream truck breaks down, it's up to the gang to find a way to deliver the tasty treats before they all melt.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev, Rumble and their friends help capture a group of wayward llamas, they each try and claim sole credit for the round up. Rev's parents listen patiently to the elaborate tales, each one starring a different hero, before ruling it a team effort! // When Avery creates a magnetic modification for Rumble, it seems to be the perfect solution. Now Rumble can help them tidy up the Gear Up Garage! But things get complicated when Rumble turns into a super-magnet, attracting all kinds of metal debris!

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: Join Rosie and her friends as they go on fun adventures, play games and solve problems. Each episode contains an educational message so that kids are engaged while learning. With a focus on friendship the show also promotes positivity through teamwork.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Berry and Dolly
programme.desc: Berry, the little snail boy and Dolly, the ladybird are best friends. Together they discover the world around them, while they make new friends with Balthazar the bee, Flutter the butterfly, Stanley the stag-beetle, Leapy the grasshopper, and many others.

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: A satisfying compilation of underwater art like Submarine and Seahorse along with a dreamy touch of a Shooting Star and many more.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing's this episode features satisfying artworks like Glitter Fish and Shooting Star.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: The best of the fun nursery rhymes are here. Five Little Monkeys Song, Ten in the bed & more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Let's charm the little ones with our peppy Teacher song, The Shark Song, Mr Sun and many more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Fill the day with music and fun with Ice-cream Song, Clap Your Hands, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Every kids loves Head Shoulders Knees and Toes, Old MacDonlad had a Farm & all the nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Learn colors with the Colors Song and tap your feet to the fun beats of Dance Song and much more!

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: Take a musical trip every morning with Down by the Bay, Outside my window I see, Car Song and more!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here are the forever loved classics like Johny Johny Yes Papa, Wheels On The Bus and more!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Meet Slick Slime Sam, a talking slime who is pink, hilarious and ready to help with your latest DIY or life hack project.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Numberblocks

programme.title: Numberblocks
