programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Shark Fight: Rox returns for the Fission City Music Awards and plans to reveal proof of Dr. Paradigm's gene-slamming experiments.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Sky Sharks: Mr. Cunneyworth lets Dr. Paradigm mutate him into Repteel, a mix of electric and moray eel. Ordered to steal a supercomputer part, he is pursued by the Sharks.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - The Night Before: Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus's secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Duel Identity Part, 1: Under Pegasus's glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the pressure?

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - Wynton's Friend / Magnus Returns!: There's a new girl in town, Jenny Hackett, who takes a liking to Wynton, and his work on the new Mobile Gate. / Emily finds herself in trouble when Strata tries to force her into a Bakugan Brawl for entertainment.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - Gregorius Reed Arrives / A Mysterious Bakugan: Drago receives a strange message from Pyravian about a stolen core cell. / Drago and the Awesome Brawlers track the missing core cell to the estate of a wealthy Bakugan collector, Gregorious Reed.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - The Hole Truth: The young Skylanders serve a day of guard duty at Cloudcracker Prison.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Space Invaders: After battling Kaos, Stealth Elf finds herself caught inside his mind and must find a way to escape.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Do the Koopa / Kootie Pie Rocks: Luigi finds a map to the Doom Dancer music box which Mario and friends have to find it in Dark Land which can stop King Koopa and his Koopalings ruling the Mushroom Kingdom. / The Marios and Toad accompany the Princess to a Milli Vinilli concert in New York City, but Kottie Pie, jealous that's she's not going to the concert, kidnaps Rob and Fab for her own.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Crimes R Us / Life's Ruff: King Koopa busts out a top criminal so he can teach the Koopalings to steal and to stop the Mario Brothers. / Hip and Hop Koopa turn Luigi and King Whim-bag, of the ice world, into dogs with the king's wand.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Eggs and I / Babysitters: Bates and Dawkins are taking Himari out for a big surprise and she is beyond excited. When the threesome drive out of the city to a clearing in the wood, Bates announces that they will be bird watching! Himari, less than thrilled with this surprise, ends up having to rescue a nest of eggs when a storm knocks them off their branch. / Shaq's friend, Mala, asks the Paq to babysit her son Axis while she and Shaq plan a benefit. When Axis disappears, Gronk, Himari, and Fleming run around the city trying to catch the adventurous little boy.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Win Klaus Win! / Himari to the Rescue!: After Klaus looses a race yet again to his arch nemesis Niccolo Tessio, he's more determined than ever to find a way to beat him. A mysterious groundskeeper offers him the answer: magic tires. / Challenged by a Super Secret Rich Guy to race each other to win 1 million dollars for charity, the Paq race all over town through different courses trying to best each other. Himari notices a man in the shadows following them and she has her suspicions that not all is as it seams. After all but Himari are suddenly trapped, it's up to her to free the Paq and stop the mysterious person's dastardly plans.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Indiana Pac and the Dentures of Doom: The diabolical dentures of an evil Mummy wizard could cause the destruction of PacWorld if they are reunited with their malicious master.

programme.desc: Divatox's forces set off false fire alarms all over Angel Grove as Justin deals with school bullies.

programme.desc: The Blue Senturion time travels to present-day Angel Grove with a message from the future for Dimitria.

programme.desc: Jindrax and Toxica discover that after 3000 years the Master Org has returned to Earth again.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Master Org's old bodyguard Retinax fights the Power Rangers to restore his lost honor.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zen-Aku battles the Rangers with his own evil Wild Zords.

programme.desc: Jindrax and Toxica hijack a bus full of innocents to coerce Max into giving up his Animal Crystal.

programme.desc: Nayzor coerces Zen-Aku into attacking the Power Rangers with their own Zords.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers learn Zen-Aku's true identity and how he became an evil warrior for the Orgs.

programme.title: Power Rangers

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Ranges Time Force travel back in time to help the Power Rangers Wild Force.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Merrick must confront a demon from his past when Zen-Aku returns to claim his soul.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kite finally remembers his past as he grows dissatisfied with mankind's disregard for nature.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers refuse to give up in their fight to save the world.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Ten Red Rangers from ten different teams unite to stop the Machine Empire from destroying the Earth.

programme.desc: Prime tries to resolve a rift between Sumdac and Sari, while Shockwave plans the invasion.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.desc: The kids join the Autobots on a mission to find a newly awakened Minicon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead is trapped aboard the warship during a plot to kill Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A Dark Energon-infused Decepticon Warship becomes sentient and directly threatens humanity.

programme.desc: Team Prime splits off in a race to beat Megatron to the next four Iacon relics.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime sends the Dinogots to a remote and mysterious island.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.desc: Mirage sets out on his own to stop the Decepticons and Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots agree to protect the female ninja robot Nightbird.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons steal the personality circuit from the Autobot named Gear.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons create a clone of Optimus Prime to lead the Autobots into a trap.

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: The Ultimate Object of Admiration
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs

Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: Spit Take!

programme.title: Grim Vengeance

programme.title: Crown Control

programme.title: The Promised Crown Affair

programme.title: Friends Reunite
programme.desc: Olly about how his obsession is affecting their relationships. Olly refuses to see the damage he's causing, but it becomes clear that he's lost touch with what really matters.

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Amigos por correspondencia

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Todos, héroes y villanos, se adaptan a las consecuencias del devastador incendio que destruyó la comunidad. Eugene encabeza a un grupo que parte en busca de Stephanie, guiados por la esperanza de encontrar otra civilización.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Princess asusta a los caballos de Eugene, Yumiko y Ezekiel, pero les promete otro medio de transporte. Mientras, Beta, en estado de delirio psicótico, guía a la horda de zombis hacia Alexandria para destruirlo todo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los seguidores de Beta se acercan a las puertas, y parte del grupo se impregna de sangre de zombi para intentar escapar entre la multitud de caminantes y regresar con ayuda. Sin embargo, los susurradores se mueven con cuchillos entre los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejado del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aaron buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alexandria, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko y Princess son capturados y separados por los misteriosos soldados que los rodeaban en la estación ferroviaria. Princess lucha con los recuerdos de su traumático pasado y planea escapar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol toman caminos separados. Ella regresa a Alexandria, mientras él se adentra en los bosques. A partir de este momento, cado uno deberá usar sus habilidades de supervivencia.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica seduce al Tijeras, y ahora es su representante en Michoacán. Tim está desesperado porque no puede ir a Washington, mientras Rutila enfurece a Rivero al contarle que Marcado la violó.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica interrumpe la reunión de los narcotraficanes para proponer ser intermediaria con los colombianos. Los Casillas asesinan a Meléndez, aunque Julia y Tim trataron de impedirlo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Furioso porque Mónica se mete en sus asuntos, y luego de una fuerte discusión, Aurelio sufre un infarto. Víctor descubre que Leonor y Omar están en Michoacán, mientras Marcado huye.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Antes de su operación, los familiares de Aurelio llegan a Michoacán, donde la Condesa se encarga de atenderlo. Julia termina con Tim, luego que mintió para no implicarlo en la muerte de Jack.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica enfrenta al Tijeras: le tenderá una trampa a Eleazar y a los Emes. Leonor visita a Feyo en su rancho, sin imaginar que ahí están los Casillas. Tim está bajo sospecha por la muerte de Jack.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica se niega a volver con Aurelio, quien confiesa que siente miedo y culpabilidad por la muerte de la esposa de Víctor. Morejón no acepta el ultimátum que los Emes le enviaron con Ignacio.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio y Tim arreglan sus cuentas a golpes. Rawlings le propone que se convierta en el mayor lavador de dinero del mundo, y también le pide que elimine al Güero, su obstáculo en la DEA.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio se reúne en Panamá con Esperanza, su nueva socia, cuya belleza y audacia lo atrapan. El Güero negocia con Tim: le dice que le irá mejor que con Rivero y le pregunta quién es su protegido.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Chiquito rompecorazones Solo quedan tres venas
programme.desc: Despiden al stripper José porque Jeffry se le lanzó encima y rompieron las tuberías del baño. Sofía es drogadicta y dejó a su hijo al cuidado de su abuela, pero ahora reclama la custodia.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Paida lajin Acoso en el elevador
programme.desc: Patricia busca la custodia de su nieta con autismo porque la madre quiere tratarla a golpes. Geraldine se quedó encerrada en el ascensor de su edificio con un depredador sexual.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Por venganza, Wendy creó perfiles falsos de Fernanda y puso sus datos en páginas eróticas. La sobrina de John tiene la hemoglobina baja y se desmaya en el colegio, él sospecha de su hermana.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Bárbara encontró a su esposo en la cama con un hombre mientras vestía la ropa interior de ella. En una fábrica de salchichas hallaron un dedo de la esposa desaparecida del dueño.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: El esposo de Luisa la dejó tener sexo con otros hombres, pero se cansó y le cerró la vagina con pegamento. Un hombre invirtió en el negocio de un amigo y fue preso por narcotráfico, pero su mujer no lo ayudó.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Sal de mi tierra, indio La obsesión
programme.desc: Quieren desalojarlo de la finca ubicada en unas tierras en las que su gente ha vivido por tres generaciones. En otro caso, lo que hace para evitar el alzhéimer provoca grandes problemas en su vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: La suerte es mía Fantasía bestial
programme.desc: Nadia y Camilo fueron al casino, ganaron 200 mil dólares y ahora se pelean por el dinero. Por otro lado, José se casó con Kelly por papeles, pero ella tiene un hijo que impone las reglas.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: La última voluntad Ahogada por manguera negra
programme.desc: Tania cumplió el deseo de su hijo: lo embalsamó y lo expuso como estatua en la sala. La esposa de Alberto murió asfixiada al practicarle sexo oral a Carlos, un hombre con un miembro inusual.

programme.title: Retofamosos
programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.title: Lagrimita y Costel
programme.desc: Grandes comediantes presentan lo mejor del entretenimiento, junto a grandes nombres de la música, en un show dinámico y loco.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.desc: Cuando su contrato con doña Olegaria está a punto de terminar, aparece Roger de los Santos, empresario que les propone manejarlos. A los héroes les encanta la idea, pero no quieren traicionar a doña Olegaria.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Doña Olegaria no puede competir contra Roger, así que se dividen la representación. La banda tiene una fecha en LA pero ninguno de ellos puede entrar a EE.UU.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Los héroes no puedan entrar a los Estados Unidos para su presentación en Los Ángeles. Así que tratan de arreglar su situación y, al hacerlo, se descubren detalles del pasado de los héroes que nadie se esperaba.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Los héroes llegan a Los Ángeles y piensan que su presentación va a ser en el estadio de los Dodgers. En realidad, son los invitados especiales del aniversario del mercado de East LA.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: Los Héroes tienen que regresar por carretera a México. En el camino les roban la camioneta y los dejan tirados en el desierto donde son secuestrados por extraterrestres.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Victoria llora en un pasillo de la escuela, a lo lejos. Mía se da cuenta y le dice que le cuente qué es lo que le pasa.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta entra al examen de Diego para distraer a la maestra de Literatura y la maestra le dice que es mentira lo que dice.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía se molesta con Miguel porque no usa el traje que le regaló y prefiere ir con una chamarra y jeans, sin importarle que van a la ópera.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón enfrenta a Roberta debido a que él, con el pretexto de buscar a José, irrumpe en su dormitorio a horas inapropiadas con violencia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Todos los chicos le donan ropa a Sabrina para los niños del hospital, Jack emocionado le dice a Miguel que ya quiere volver a ver a Sabrina, el dinero que recauden es para medicinas de los niños del hospital.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia les cuenta a Celina y Vico que estuvo a punto de entregarse con Miguel pero que Gastón casi los descubre. León sorprende a Diego y sus amigos intentando salir del colegio. Vico tiene dificultades con su padre. Jose sufre al ver a Raquel y Teo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego y Giovanni le dicen a Tomás que Sol lo engaña, pero Sol le dice que sus amigos los quieren separar porque están interesados en ella y Tomás la perdona.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los alumnos hacen una protesta, pues con el entrenamiento de fútbol no tienen tiempo de estudiar. Roberta propone entrenar los fines de semana y todos se ponen en su contra.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor: Confrontación
programme.desc: Gloria recibe ayuda para afrontar su enfermedad. Santos le deja en claro a Coloso que él será como un padre para Rodrigo. María confronta a Santos sobre la información que Rubén encontró y le pregunta si de verdad es un delincuente.

programme.title: Pasión y poder: Las gestiones de Franco
programme.desc: Arturo y David van a ofrecerle sus servicios a Ashmore, pero les dice que tiene que valorar la propuesta porque también está en negociaciones con Eladio Gómez Luna.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan tiene fiebre y habla sobre su hermana. Sofía sale a buscar ayuda y las mujeres del pueblo la quieren apedrear por ser una mujer infiel.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Gabriela le confiesa a Fernando que ella sabe quién es la verdadera hija de Eva. Gabriela amenaza con matar a Juan, pero sus hermanos lo defienden. Maracuyá le propone a Óscar pasar la noche juntos.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Óscar le pide a Jimena que se casen sin el permiso de Gabriela. Sarita y Gabriela se prueban sus vestidos de novia.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Fernando le confiesa al Padre Tadeo que él fue el que provocó el accidente de Bernardo Elizondo. Una trabajadora social quiere llevarse a Pablo.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Presunto asesino

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven sale del tutelar de menores para enmendar los errores del pasado y ser un mejor ejemplo para su hermano menor, pero éste se mete en problemas al relacionarse con la banda que una vez traicionó a su hermano.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que se excusa, se acusa
programme.desc: Ileana decide poner pastillas antidepresivas en las bebidas de su mejor amiga Gabriela, quien se queda dormida o se desmaya en los ensayos para una obra de teatro, pero ella misma se pone en evidencia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Dori ayuda a Chema a conseguir empleo en el centro nocturno en el que ella trabaja. Chema pronto se da cuenta de todo lo que ocurre en ese lugar, lo que provoca que su vida corra peligro, pero un agente encubierto intervendrá en el momento oportuno.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que vive de ilusiones, muere de desengaños
programme.desc: Madre e hija encuentran, en un afamado conferencista, un camino para salir adelante del sufrimiento luego de que fueron abandonadas, pero estarán en peligro ya que solo quieren sacarles dinero.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space. In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album.Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way. NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.”

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style. The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy.The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.” RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released. It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles,

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: John Coltrane
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Dizzy Gillespie, Tony Coe, Derek Humble & Billy Mitchell
programme.desc: American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader Dizzy Gillespie (1917-1993) was one of the seminal figures of the bebop movement. He fuses all musical forms rooted in African culture, such as music from Cuba, Latin America and the Caribbean, into his music. On November 4, 1970 he played a concert in Denmark with the Kenny Clarke/Francy Boland Big Band, performing Con Alma, Brother K, Now Hear My Meanin', Manteca, Let Me Outta Here, and Things Are Here.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: Coleman Hawkins
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Jimmy Witherspoon & Rozaa Wortham
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. Jimmy Witherspoon and Rozaa Wortham, two incredible brilliant jazz musicians. Rozaa Wortham starts off the show with the Jimmy Witherspoon Quartet. Swinging and full of energy she performs ‘It Don't Mean A Thing'. Jimmy Witherspoon, known for the song “Ain't Nobody's Business” ends the show with some astounding lean-back blues.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Gonzalo Rubalcaba, Ron Carter & Jul Barretto
programme.desc: 'Münchner Klaviersommer' was an annual concerts series that took place from 1981 to 1998 in Munich, Germany. Although the festival's name suggests a strong focus on piano music, it featured countless famous musicians from jazz and classical music – not just pianists. The concerts were usually held in July at The Gasteig, home of the Munich Philharmonic. In 1994, Cuban pianist Gonzalo Rubalcaba was one of the artists appearing here. With bassist Ron Carter - one of the living legends on this instrument - and highly talented Cuban jazz drummer Julio Barreto, Rubalcaba's trio marks an important step in the development of jazz trio playing in the 1990s. Moreover, it demonstrates the brilliant improvisational and technical abilities of Gonzalo Rubalcaba, who has become one of our present-day jazz legends.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: John Coltrane
programme.desc: Explore the music of one of the most influential and innovative saxophonists in jazz history: John Coltrane! Immerse yourself in this collection of remarkable performances from the early 1960s that showcase Coltrane's unparalleled artistry and unique sound during a transformative period in the artist's career. Recorded in various European cities, Coltrane is seen playing the songs “Autumn Leaves”, “Hackensack”, “My Favorite Things”, “I Want To Talk About You”, “Vigil”, and “Naima”. Tune in and experience why the music of John Coltrane has touched the lives of so many!

programme.title: Modern Jazz Quartet
programme.desc: Formed in 1952 from the rhythm section of Dizzy Gillespie's big band, the Modern Jazz Quartet took its inspiration from classical chamber music as well as jazz's blues roots. The group enjoyed a decades-long career with multiple critically acclaimed albums, cementing their place in the history of the genre. Following concerts in Rotterdam and Amsterdam the days before, the Modern Jazz Quartet performed at Singer Concertzaal in Laren for Dutch TV on March 31, 1969. Composed of Milt Jackson on vibraphone, John Lewis on piano, Percy Heath on bass, and Connie Kay on drums, the foursome plays with elegance and style.

programme.title: Douglas Boyd, Orchestre de chambre de Paris, Accentus Chamber Choir & Carolyn Sampson
programme.desc: Composer George Frideric Handel's oratorio Messiah, HWV 56 is his best-known work. He wrote this choral masterpiece in just 24 days in 1741. Following its premiere in Dublin in 1742, the work has been immensely popular. The oratorio's three parts deal with the birth, death, and resurrection of Jesus Christ. Charles Jennens' libretto is based on texts from the Old and New Testament. In this performance, English conductor Douglas Boyd leads chamber choir Accentus and Orchestre de chambre de Paris. The soloists are soprano Carolyn Sampson, mezzosoprano Paula Murrihy, tenor Allan Clayton, and bass Matthew Rose. Captured at the Philharmonie de Paris on December 22, 2015, this performance underlines the enduring majesty of Handel's masterpiece.

programme.title: Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra & Claudio Abbado
programme.desc: Maestro Abbado made a big donation when he appeared with the Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra at the Suntory Hall in Tokyo in 1994. Claudio Abbado's Japanese tour is considered one of the highlights of his career and this concert is especially memorable. The original version of Mussorgsky's A Night on Bald Mountain and a sequel from Stravinsky's The Firebird, which contains 7 of the 19 pieces of the full-length ballet, are on the program. This concert ends with one of Tchaikovsky's most popular pieces, Symphony No. 5.

programme.title: Raphael Pichon, Ensemble Pygmalion, Sabine Devieilhe & Arnaud de Pasquale
programme.sub-title: Mozart - A Gala for the Weber Sisters
programme.desc: On March 23, 1783, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart gave a successful concert at Vienna's Burgtheater that he dedicated to two sopranos: Aloysia and Josepha Weber, the sisters of his wife Constanze. The concert's program would be considered odd by today's standards. The composer's Symphony No. 35 was broken up and interspersed with other compositions, such as concertos, arias, and works for solo piano. Nearly two and a half centuries later, French soprano Sabine Devieilhe, conductor Raphaël Pichon and his Ensemble Pygmalion bring a wonderful concert inspired by that remarkable event. The program includes: ‘Allegro con spirito' of Symphony No. 35, also known as the Haffner Symphony ‘Vorrei spiegarvi, oh Dio', KV 418 ‘Schon lacht der holde Frühling', KV 580 Trio of ‘Die Schlittenfahrt' No. 3, KV 605 Deutscher Tanz No. 6, KV 571 ‘Der Hölle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen' from Mozart's opera Die Zauberflöte ‘Finale: Presto' of Symphony No. 35 ‘Nehmt meinen Dank', KV 383 and ‘Dans un bois solitaire et sombre', KV 308. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Impérial de Compiègne, in Compiègne, France.

programme.title: Philippe Jordan & Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Philippe Jordan and the Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris recorded all of Ludwig van Beethoven's symphonies in 2014-2015. In this program, Jordan conducts Beethoven's Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. Beethoven composed his Symphony No. 5 between 1804 and 1808, completing the work around the same time as his Symphony No. 6, ‘Pastorale'. Both symphonies saw their premieres in a legendary, all-Beethoven concert on December 22, 1808. Symphony No. 5 has become one of the best-known compositions in western classical music. It opens with the famous four-note motif, often interpreted as the musical manifestation of 'fate knocking at the door'. This rhythmic figure returns in various guises in the other three movements of the symphony. This performance was recorded at Opéra Bastille in Paris, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Jonathon Heyward & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.desc: American conductor Jonathon Heyward makes his debut with the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) with this performance of Antonín Dvořák's beloved Symphony No. 9 in E minor, Op. 95, "From the New World". Composed during Dvořák's stay in the United States, the work blends Bohemian warmth with the rhythms and spirit of American musical traditions. A deeply expressive and melodic masterpiece, it remains one of the most popular symphonies of all time. This performance was recorded at LSO St. Luke's on Old Street in London, UK, on September 30, 2020.

programme.title: Franz Welser-Möst & Cleveland Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Franz in Vienna: Mozart and Schoenberg
programme.desc: Austrian conductor Franz Welser-Möst leads his Cleveland Orchestra in a performance of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Divertimento No. 2 in D major, KV 131, and Arnold Schoenberg's Variations for Orchestra, Op. 31, recorded at Severance Hall in Cleveland, USA. In addition, Welser-Möst takes a walk through ‘his' Vienna, enlightening us on this musical capital that was home to both Mozart and Schoenberg. He contrasts the Divertimento No. 2, written by 16-year-old Mozart, with Variations for Orchestra, by the mature Schoenberg.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Beneath the Sea a compilation of spectacular underwater images from around the world. Captured in exclusively in 8K digital, Beneath the Sea features an award-winning original score by Alan Williams.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Peaceful Mountain Snow w Music
programme.desc: Peaceful Mountain Snow is a 1- hour dynamic nature film shot in the gorgeous mountains of Banff National Park, in Alberta Canada. Shortly after the video begins, a big snowstorm sets in, blanketing the rugged mountain valley with a blanket of fresh falling white snow. Towards the end of the film, the snow calms and glorious sun returns to light up the white winter wonderland.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise 1
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sea turtles, for 2 full hours of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborators Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast, Turtle Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Jason Stephenson.

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand (Music)

programme.title: Glistening Island Beach
programme.desc: An instant classic and perfect scene for mental escape, "Glistening Island Beach" places viewers underneath a big beautiful palm tree facing a perfect white sandy beach, glistening blue sea, sunshine, and the small boat you arrived in. Filmed in 4K Ultra High Definition on the hidden [and now privately owned] exotic island of Nanuku, where a small atoll is surrounded by an untouched perfect lagoon, miles away from it all....

programme.title: ART Rising
programme.desc: This collection gallops through the beauty, strength, and spirit of these magnificent creatures—capturing motion, freedom, and the unbridled energy that has inspired art and imagination for centuries.

programme.title: ART Rising

programme.title: ART Rising
